main_story.speaker: elara_001
lines: Wait... your eyes. They aren't hollow anymore.
You’ve been wandering these woods for a lifetime, stranger. I thought you were just another shadow of the past.
Can you hear me? Do you remember your name?

main_story.speaker: elara_001
lines: Kaelen. The name from the old tapestries... The Living Archive.
If you've truly returned, the world might finally start turning again. We need to find the Shard in the Sunken Library.

main_story.speaker: kaelen_001
lines: I remember... the ink. I remember the smell of parchment and the weight of a thousand secrets.
I was not just a watcher. I was the lock on the door of time.

main_story.speaker: malakor_001
lines: A flicker in the dark. How quaint.
You struggle to remember a world that was better off forgotten, Kaelen.
Every memory you reclaim is a scar you choose to reopen. Why not stay hollow? It was... peaceful.

main_story.speaker: mira_thenn_001
lines: Welcome to the Forum of Glass, where every claim is reflected and none are hidden.
Conservators demand full truth. Quietists demand selective mercy. The Order demands silence.
Kaelen, if you seek alliance, you will answer for the judgments of your former self.

main_story.speaker: elara_001
lines: I found the names in the tablet margins. My family's exile route is there, in your seal script.
I know you were not whole then or now... but this wound is mine to carry too.
Tell me the truth in front of everyone. No more protected versions.

main_story.speaker: kaelen_001
lines: I remember the verdict. I remember signing it with certainty and calling it balance.
I will not ask forgiveness as payment. I offer record, repair, and the burden of being witnessed.
Let the world judge the man I was and the one I choose to become.

main_story.speaker: ser_caldrin_001
lines: I fed routes to the Quietists. Not to damn you, Kaelen, but to prevent another throne of memory.
I thought silence would save lives. It only delayed this reckoning.
If the coalition needs a traitor's head, I will kneel. If it needs my sword, I will stand.

main_story.speaker: elara_001
lines: I don't love the legend. I love the person who kept telling the truth when it hurt.
We carry the past together, or not at all.
When this is over, we rebuild more than walls. We rebuild meaning.

main_story.speaker: kaelen_001
lines: The Archive cannot be a prison any longer, and you will not pay this price for me, Elara.
I release the endless memory. I release the endless life. Let history belong to the living.
If I forget the titles, keep my name. If I forget the wars, keep my promise.

main_story.speaker: elara_001
lines: The lanterns are lit. The shelves are still uneven. It's perfect.
You remember enough to laugh at my notes and argue with my catalog system.
That's all I ever wanted: a future where memory serves life.

side_quests.speaker: npc_baker_001
lines: The oven is hot, but the recipe is... gone. Slipped through my head like sand.
They say a fragment of the Old Kitchen lies in the Whispering Vales. Could you look for it?

side_quests.speaker: npc_baker_001
lines: No recipe, no bread. My stomach is as empty as my memory.

side_quests.speaker: npc_baker_001
lines: That's it! The Sourdough of the Ancients! The smell... it brings back the image of my mother's face.
Thank you, Traveler. Please, take this. It's a Heart of the Hearth.

side_quests.speaker: ser_caldrin_001
lines: I need sealed witness scrolls from the old barracks before the tribunal convenes.
Bring them to me, and I will give testimony no faction can ignore.

side_quests.speaker: ser_caldrin_001
lines: These names deserved better than redaction. So did you.
Take this. The old command sigil still opens routes through Ember Crown.

side_quests.speaker: mira_thenn_001
lines: Bring me three grievances from opposing houses, each stamped and witnessed.
If you can hold contradictions without drawing steel, we may avoid a civil collapse.

greeting: The gears turn. What requires mending?
History is a blade that needs constant sharpening.
silas_001.insufficient_funds: Your thoughts are too shallow for this trade. Bring more Essence.
silas_001.upgrade_complete: It is restored. May it strike with the weight of a century.

world_flavor.speaker: npc_cat_005
lines: Don't trip on the dust. It's all that's left of the Great Poets.
Meow. Or whatever sound you remember cats making.

world_flavor.speaker: npc_knight_002
lines: Stand fast, soldier. The Archive is watching. We must not be forgotten.
